source-discipline.reason: All five batch-2 probes performed live this session. HTTP responses recorded as observed: CN openstd 200 19KB, gov.cn 404, mohurd DNS-unresolved; JP JISC 403 service-stopped, JSA catalog 200 with 販売/購入 commercial tokens, MLIT barrierfree 200 no 9251 tokens; NL NEN 404 on URL-guess and search, home 200 164KB no 9120 tokens; BR ABNT catalog sustained 503; JA MEXT 4 URL attempts including 1.4KB stub, no specific guideline page found. Owner constraint received and integrated rather than papered over.

best-practice-synthesis-routing.reason: DR amendment is methodology, not synthesis content. Sonnet scope.

adversarial-research-protocol.reason: No gap rows touched; no research-generating gap closure performed.

evidence-verification-gate-for-synthesis.reason: DR extends the verification_status state machine with IS-PAYWALL and DEFERRED-V2-AUTOMATED to honestly characterize rule #10 ineligibility causes. Neither state clears the existence gate; both preserve rule #10's predicate. The IS-PAYWALL state explicitly parallels rule #10 sub-rule 2's existing PAYWALL value_match — consistency across the two rule-#10 axes.

deviations.reason: Two new verification_status enum values introduced (IS-PAYWALL, DEFERRED-V2-AUTOMATED) without prior CI schema validation. The evidence_sources.verification_status column appears to be free-text (no CHECK constraint observed); the values are documented in the DR but not yet propagated to scripts/audit_evidence_metadata.py or scripts/audit/reasoning_doc_citations_audit.py. Risk: audits may treat these as unknown/invalid until updated. Mitigation: audit scripts to be updated in a follow-up commit before promotion to skill per DR §6 step 5.

bias_direction: Compounding self-authoring bias: the batch-2 yield (0/5 cleared gate) is unambiguously worse than the optimistic projection in the original DR §5.1. The amendment translates this into a less-favorable but honest yield projection (+13-18 rows instead of 40+). Bias risk is now toward overcompensating in the pessimistic direction — i.e., the protocol could now under-promise its own value to insulate against further yield surprises. The +13-18 rows figure is genuine ('roughly' qualifier preserved), not deliberately deflated.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: An outside reviewer could argue that introducing IS-PAYWALL and DEFERRED-V2-AUTOMATED at the protocol layer is the wrong fix — the right fix is to abandon the manual-track entirely now that hard-case yield is confirmed 0%, redirect effort to building V2-automated scrapers, and let the existing UNVERIFIED-CLOSED status absorb the unverifiable rows. Counter: V2-automated remains pending with no estimated ship date; the manual track is still recovering +13-18 rows that V2 would otherwise recover later; and the explicit IS-PAYWALL queue transforms an ambiguous 15-20-row liability into a costed actionable backlog. The manual-track value proposition is reduced but not eliminated by batch 2 results.
